CheckTitle: Detect disabled user accounts with active role assignments
Description: Checks whether any disabled user accounts still have directory role assignments. Disabled accounts with active roles indicate incomplete offboarding and may be exploitable if re-enabled.
Risk: Disabled accounts with active role assignments are a ticking time bomb. If re-enabled (accidentally or maliciously), the account immediately regains its privileged access. This pattern also indicates weak offboarding procedures.

Remediation.Recommendation: Remove all directory role assignments from disabled user accounts. Implement automated offboarding workflows that revoke roles before disabling accounts.

SourceNotes: Incomplete offboarding is a common finding in penetration tests.
